error_signature: no images returned from S3 folder
title: S3 Node not retrieving images from specified folder
symptom: When attempting to get images from a specific folder in an S3 bucket, no images are returned. The S3 node only retrieves images from the bucket level.
applies_when: Targeting a specific folder within the bucket
not_this_if: Images are located directly in the bucket without subfolders
root_cause: The S3 node requires a specific configuration to access images within a folder. By default, it looks for images at the bucket level unless specified otherwise. The folder key must be set correctly to include the folder path.
fix_steps: Ensure the folder key ends with a '/' to include all subfolders
Save the workflow and execute it again
agent_instruction: Set the 'Folder Key' in the S3 node to 'image-resize/' and save the workflow.
